landing.heroSub1: Targenix is the production-grade webhook layer between Meta and your CRM, Telegram, or HTTP endpoints.
landing.heroTrust: No credit card · 5-minute setup · AES-256 encrypted from day one
landing.flowRetry: If any destination fails — 3 retries with 1 h spacing
landing.flowEncryption: Tokens AES-256 encrypted, never reach the browser
landing.problemSub: Every minute a lead waits in Meta's UI is a buyer cooling off. Manual exports drop fields. In-house webhooks break under load. Targenix is what we built so you stop losing money to all three.
landing.problemWithout1: Leads sit in Facebook UI for hours before someone checks
landing.problemWithout2: Manual CSV exports drop fields, miss ad attribution
landing.problemWithout3: One destination crashes — every lead behind it is lost
landing.problemWithout4: No retries. No audit trail. No replay.
landing.problemWith2: Full field_data + ad attribution enriched per lead
landing.problemWith3: Concurrent fan-out — one failure doesn't block the rest
landing.problemWith4: 3 retries, 1 h backoff, full replay UI
landing.howSub: This is the actual pipeline running in production — verified, enriched, routed, retried. No black box.
landing.howStep1Body: Meta sends a leadgen event to POST /api/webhooks/facebook. We return 200 in < 50 ms — Meta's requirement.
landing.howStep2Body: HMAC-SHA256 of raw body against FACEBOOK_APP_SECRET. No match → 403, logged, discarded.
landing.howStep3Body: Resolve encrypted FB token, fetch /{leadgen_id}?fields=field_data,ad_id,…. Phone/name/email + ad attribution denormalized.
landing.howStep4Body: Lookup integrations where page_id + form_id match. Fan out one Order per active destination.
landing.howStep5Body: Telegram, HTTP, CRMs — sent in parallel. Each Order tracked individually. Failures retry 3× at 1 h spacing.
landing.codeSub: From the raw Meta webhook to your destination — exactly what the wire sees.
landing.codeVarBody: — or any custom field from the lead — anywhere in your URL, headers, or body.
landing.featuresSub: Every claim below maps to a specific subsystem you can audit in the repo.
landing.feat1Body: Webhook to destination in ~ 800 ms, end-to-end. BullMQ + Redis means it survives restarts.
landing.feat2Body: Every Meta webhook payload signature-checked against your FACEBOOK_APP_SECRET. No spoofing.
landing.feat3Body: Long-lived Facebook access tokens encrypted before storage. Never leave the server.
landing.feat4Body: If a destination is down, 3 retries with 1 hour spacing. Plus a stuck-lead detector for anything over 10 min.
landing.feat5Body: Page + form → Telegram and HTTP webhook and CRM simultaneously. One failure doesn't block the rest.
landing.feat6Body: Server-Sent Events feed of every incoming webhook. Watch leads land in real time from any admin terminal.
landing.feat7Body: Every raw payload stored for audit and replay. Re-process a missed lead in one click.
landing.feat8Body: Send leads as Telegram messages, POST/GET to any URL, or append to a Google Sheet row. Variable injection everywhere.
landing.feat9Body: Reusable destination templates (100k.uz, Sotuvchi, Alijahon, Inbaza, MyCPA). Users just paste their key.
landing.case1Detail: Spring sale captures lead → Targenix routes to sales Telegram group with phone & product preference, plus pushes to AmoCRM pipeline.
landing.case2Detail: One form, multiple CPA networks. Each gets its specific payload. If one fails, the others still get the lead.
landing.case3Flow: Lead → Telegram team channel + HTTP webhook
landing.case3Detail: Lead lands in the agent Telegram with property of interest + their phone. HTTP webhook fires a CRM entry simultaneously.
landing.case4Detail: Each application appends to a Sheets row for admissions team, plus instant Telegram ping. Retries automatic on Sheets quota errors.
landing.securitySub: Real security — specific algorithms, specific guarantees. Not "enterprise grade" buzzwords.
landing.sec1Body: Every webhook from Meta is signature-verified using crypto.timingSafeEqual against your FACEBOOK_APP_SECRET.
landing.sec2Body: Long-lived Facebook tokens encrypted before they hit the database. Decrypted only in-memory at delivery time.
landing.sec3Body: Every database query is userId-scoped. No cross-tenant leaks — enforced at the router layer, tested in CI.
landing.sec4Body: Facebook OAuth and Google OAuth run entirely server-side. Access tokens never reach your browser.
landing.ctaSub: Connect Facebook in 60 seconds. Pick a destination. Every new lead lands where it should — automatically.

telegram.title: Telegram Settings
telegram.subtitle: Connect Telegram and manage delivery chats for lead notifications.
telegram.notificationsDesc: Connect your Telegram account to receive lead notifications instantly
telegram.connectStep1: Click the button below — Telegram opens
telegram.connectStep2: Press Start in the Telegram chat
telegram.waitingConnection: Waiting for connection… this page refreshes automatically every 5 seconds.
telegram.connectHint: Click the button → Telegram opens → Press Start → Done
telegram.deliveryChatsDesc: Add a Telegram group/channel for lead delivery (leads will NOT go to your system chat)
telegram.deliveryStep1: Add the bot to your group/channel
telegram.deliveryStep3: The bot will post the Chat ID in that chat
telegram.deliveryStep4: Paste the Chat ID below and link
telegram.deliveryMappingDesc: Choose Auto (one chat for all) or Manual (map each destination).
telegram.deliveryMappingDisabledDesc: Add at least one delivery chat first — then you can map destinations/templates to chats.
telegram.deliveryMappingDisabledBody: Mapping is disabled until you link a delivery chat in the section above.
telegram.disconnectBody1: This will remove all Telegram data from your account:
telegram.disconnectBody2: After disconnecting, leads will stop delivering to Telegram until you connect again.
